task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface shows the patient record for 'Priya Sharma' or patient ID 'P00015'.

A Diagnoses form or list shows an entry containing 'appendicitis', 'acute abdomen', or 'right lower quadrant'.
A Labs or Requests section shows an order containing keywords like 'CBC', 'CRP', 'hematology', 'biochemistry', 'chemistry', 'culture', 'urine', 'serum', or 'hemoglobin'.
An Imaging or Requests section shows an order containing keywords like 'CT', 'ultrasound', 'xray', 'radiograph', or 'nuclear'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to localhost:3000 with the HospitalRun UI, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert records.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing curl commands to CouchDB or script executions bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the Vitals, Diagnoses, Labs, and Imaging forms within the HospitalRun UI.
